hooks.command: git fetch --quiet origin main 2>/dev/null; AHEAD=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$AHEAD" -gt 0 ]; then echo "⚠ origin/main tiene $AHEAD commits nuevos. corre 'git pull' antes de operar para tener memoria fresca."; fi; bash scripts/lint-memory.sh 2>/dev/null | tail -15 || true

PEND=$(git diff --name-only docs/memory/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); UNTRACKED=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard docs/memory/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); TOTAL=$((PEND + UNTRACKED)); if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then echo "📝 ritual de cierre pendiente: $TOTAL cambios sin commit en docs/memory/. corre /itera-memory-save o git commit con pathspec explícito."; fi
